lore.summary: A powerful, prosperous interstellar empire to the galactic east of the Star Kingdom, founded by the mercenary-turned-warlord Gustav Anderman (who believed himself a reincarnation of Frederick the Great). Ruled by the hereditary Anderman dynasty from Potsdam in the New Berlin System, with a strong Prussian/Germanic and Chinese cultural blend. Its first-rate Imperial Andermani Navy long sparred with Manticore over the Silesian Confederacy before the two became wartime allies.
lore.official_language: Standard English (German and Chinese cultural heritage)
lore.head_of_state: Emperor of the Andermani (House of Anderman)

territory.note: Built systems so far: New Berlin (capital) and Durandel. Gregor-B is also Andermani (the system's Junction terminus, Gregor-A, is Manticoran).
